earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes TikTok-led streaming reactivation, playlist longevity, and independent-leaning economics that leave a healthier artist-side share.

ownership.master_owner: Likely artist or artist-affiliated control with distribution-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Likely closely held around the songwriting side
ownership.notes: Smaller catalogs can produce modest gross revenue but a relatively efficient artist-side cut.
